text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I woke up early to do some extra training...
Before I knew it, the sun had set.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in training... I lost track of
time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Or perhaps, the flow of time distorted as it
passed through another dimension...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...If it means I can catch up with my friend, then
maybe that's not such a bad thing... hehe.
